name: Rhino 3D
cap: Industry-standard NURBS + mesh modeling platform. Primary hub for AI plugin ecosystem — Grasshopper, Veras, Enscape, V-Ray, D5 Render, Raven, InfraredCity, and KeyShot all plug in directly. Widely used in architecture studios, industrial design, and HDL anthropometry research at CDes.

name: Grasshopper
cap: Visual algorithmic design environment built into Rhino. Connects to ML models via the Hops component. Used for generative facade studies, structural optimization, parametric planting, and ergonomic form iteration. Raven AI plugin makes it accessible via natural language — no scripting required.

name: Veras
cap: Only AI renderer with native plugin integration across 7 BIM/CAD platforms simultaneously: Rhino, Revit, SketchUp, Archicad, Vectorworks, Autodesk Forma, and AllPlan. Geometry Override slider controls how much AI modifies vs preserves underlying geometry. 44% of architects now use AI for concept images.

name: Enscape
cap: Real-time rendering and VR walkthrough plugin running live inside Rhino, Revit, SketchUp, Archicad, and Vectorworks. AI denoising accelerates render quality at any resolution. One-click VR for client walkthroughs. Industry standard for architecture and interior design client presentations.

name: V-Ray for Rhino
cap: Professional GPU-accelerated ray tracing plugin for Rhino with advanced material library and AI denoising. Produces studio-quality stills and animations directly from Rhino models. Used for award submissions, publications, and high-end client deliverables.

name: Raven
cap: #1 AI plugin in the Rhino/Grasshopper ecosystem on Food4Rhino. Conversational AI chat interface inside Grasshopper — describe what you want in natural language and Raven writes, adjusts, and debugs Grasshopper scripts in real time. Removes the scripting barrier for students new to parametric design. Compatible with all other Grasshopper plugins.

name: InfraredCity
cap: AI-driven environmental analysis plugin for Rhino. Replaces slow setup-heavy simulations with AI analysis in seconds: solar, wind, microclimate, pedestrian comfort. Includes an AI Assistant trained on urban microclimate principles and local climate data. AI Reporting System auto-generates written explanations shareable as web links — no Rhino required for stakeholders.

name: Ladybug Tools
cap: Open-source environmental analysis suite for Grasshopper. Four tools: Ladybug (climate data visualization), Honeybee (energy + daylight simulation), Butterfly (CFD), Dragonfly (urban heat island). Brings climate performance feedback into the design loop early. Increasingly paired with ML for parametric optimization.

name: Rendair AI
cap: Web-based AI rendering platform with dedicated Rhino, Grasshopper, Vectorworks, and SketchUp workflow pipelines. Upload block-out models and AI handles lighting, textures, and environment. In-painting swaps specific materials without regenerating the whole image. 4K upscaling for production-ready output. Bridges the gap between KeyShot (hours to set up) and Midjourney (geometry-disconnected).

name: SolidWorks
cap: Industry-standard parametric 3D CAD for mechanical and industrial design. Native AI features in 2026: AURA virtual companion (documentation assistant on 3DEXPERIENCE), Leo (AI drawing creation — generates sheets with views and dimensions from chat), Auto Repair Mates, Selection Accelerators, Fastener Recognition, Command Predictor, and Contextual Assistant. AURA is a Q&A assistant trained on SolidWorks documentation — not yet a generative design co-pilot.

name: Altair SimSolid
cap: Meshless structural analysis add-in for SolidWorks. Solves large complex assemblies without meshing — eliminates hours of setup. AI-guided rapid iteration: analyze a part, trim material, re-analyze in minutes. Excellent for screening rib patterns, wall thickness, and material removal ideas early in the design process. Direct SolidWorks add-in for seamless geometry transfer.

name: CES Granta Selector
cap: AI-assisted materials selection plugin connecting directly to SolidWorks. Compares, ranks, and recommends material substitutions based on performance requirements, cost, sustainability, and manufacturing process. Pushes selected material properties directly into SolidWorks models. Most valuable for regulated environments requiring material traceability and substitution documentation.

name: Autodesk Forma
cap: AI-driven early-stage site and massing platform. Analyzes solar, wind, noise, microclimate, density, and ecological performance in seconds. Native ArcGIS integration (launched June 2025) brings GIS layers directly into the design environment. Forma Connected Clients (Autodesk University 2025) enables seamless movement between Forma and Revit with shared data. Formerly Spacemaker.

name: TestFit
cap: Generative building feasibility platform. Automatically generates code-compliant layouts, unit mixes, parking counts, and pro forma financial data from a site outline in real time. Converts site constraints into hard development numbers in minutes. Standard in multifamily and mixed-use pre-design. Integrates with Autodesk Forma for analysis handoff.

name: Snaptrude
cap: Browser-based AI BIM platform. AI agents generate zoning-compliant building program, massing, and full BIM model from an RFP document upload. Exports to Revit with parameters and families intact. Closes the gap between early-stage concepting and documentation-ready BIM. Integrates with Autodesk Forma for analysis.

name: D5 Render
cap: Real-time rendering with three distinct AI features: AI Material Generator (photo → PBR texture), AI Atmosphere Match (relight scene to match a reference photo), and AI Scatter (intelligent vegetation placement). LiveSync plugins connect Rhino, Revit, SketchUp, and Vectorworks for real-time model updates.

name: LookX
cap: AI rendering platform purpose-built for interior and architecture. Two modes: Content Mode (AI generates and places furniture/materials into space) and Composition Mode (AI respects exact geometry, replaces only materials and lighting). Native SketchUp and Rhino plugins.

name: Planner 5D
cap: AI-assisted space planning tool. AI floor plan recognition converts a photo or hand sketch into a 3D model. Design Generator creates style variants from a single layout. Accessible for clients to co-design without technical expertise.

name: ArcGIS Pro
cap: Industry-standard GIS platform with AI-assisted spatial analysis, environmental modeling, land-use studies, and 3D city planning. ArcGIS for Autodesk Forma (launched June 2025) brings GIS layers natively into the Forma design environment and enables export to Revit with geographic accuracy preserved.

name: Vectorworks Landmark
cap: Leading landscape BIM authoring tool. Integrates GIS, drone survey, point cloud, and field data directly into the BIM model with real-time linked updates. Standard for large-scale landscape and planning projects. Exports to IFC, connects with ArcGIS.

name: Midjourney
cap: Highest artistic quality text-to-image AI. v7 (April 2025) added character consistency via cref tag for campaign and narrative visual coherence. Standard mood board and concept imagery tool across all CDes disciplines. Commercial use requires paid subscription.

name: Adobe Firefly
cap: Commercially safe generative AI trained exclusively on licensed Adobe Stock and public domain content. Embedded in Photoshop (Generative Fill, Generative Expand), Illustrator (text-to-vector, Generative Recolor), and InDesign. Adobe provides IP indemnification for commercial use — critical distinction from Midjourney. CC Standard plan $54.99/mo as of Feb 2026.

name: Adobe Illustrator AI
cap: Firefly integrated directly into Illustrator. Key AI features: text-to-vector (generates editable SVG paths from prompts), Generative Recolor (recolors artwork across multiple variants instantly), AI font matching. Same IP indemnification as Firefly — safest commercial vector AI workflow.

name: DALL-E 3
cap: Text-to-image generation natively inside ChatGPT. Strong prompt adherence and conversational iteration — refine images through dialogue. Lower artistic ceiling than Midjourney but faster iteration cycles. Good for quick concept passes and client rough communication.

name: Stable Diffusion
cap: Open-source image generation at version 3.5 (2025). Runs locally on compatible GPU hardware — enables brand-trained custom model fine-tuning with LoRA adapters. No subscription, maximum customization and privacy. Community models on Civitai and HuggingFace. Requires technical setup.

name: Recraft
cap: Only AI image tool that generates native SVG vector output from text prompts. Creates icons, logos, spot illustrations as fully editable vectors — no manual tracing. Style guide feature locks palette and visual language for brand consistency. Exports directly to Illustrator-compatible SVG.

name: Canva Magic Studio
cap: Suite of AI features inside Canva: Magic Design (text-to-branded-layout), Magic Animate (auto-animated social content), Magic Layers (converts flat photo into editable layer stack, March 2026), Brand Kit auto-apply. 43% business adoption in 2026. Fastest for marketing assets, social content, lookbooks, and presentation decks.

name: Claude
cap: Cross-disciplinary AI assistant for the full design process written layer: literature synthesis, design briefs, task analysis, regulatory writing, code generation, design narratives, grant writing. CDes three-database NotebookLM methodology developed and validated at CDes. Strong for HFE research, sustainability reporting, and strategic communications.

name: NotebookLM
cap: Document-grounded AI research tool. Grounds all responses in uploaded sources — cannot hallucinate beyond your documents. CDes three-database methodology (developed by Milo Tacheny at CDes): three simultaneous notebooks for literature, standards, and case studies, cross-referenced via Claude. Audio Overview feature creates podcast-style summaries of complex documents.

name: Perplexity
cap: AI search engine that cites every claim with live web sources. Best for current tool releases, standards updates, competitive research, and recent publications. Complements NotebookLM (uploaded docs) by covering the live web. Pro plan adds access to multiple AI models.

name: Miro AI
cap: AI layer on Miro's infinite canvas. AI Assist: clusters sticky notes into affinity themes, generates journey maps and diagrams from text, synthesizes workshop output into structured summaries. Standard for design sprints, HFE affinity mapping, and cross-functional team workshops.

name: Gamma
cap: AI presentation and document builder. Generate a structured deck from a text outline in under 60 seconds. Live web publishing, interactive embeds, viewer engagement analytics. Faster than PowerPoint for stakeholder communication. Used for trend presentations, assortment reviews, and design competition submissions.

name: Figma AI
cap: Full AI-assisted product design ecosystem (2026): First Draft (UI from text), Replace Content, Make an Image, Add Interactions, Check Designs (accessibility linter), Figma Make (prompt-to-functional-prototype), MCP server (Claude writes directly to Figma files), Dev Mode (AI code specs). 78% of designers report AI boosts work efficiency.

name: Uizard
cap: AI-first wireframing tool. Four entry points: sketch photo to wireframe, screenshot to editable design, text prompt to UI, or whiteboard photo to screens. AI design chatbot iterates conversationally. Strong for concept validation before moving to Figma.

name: Google Stitch
cap: Relaunched March 2026 with infinite canvas and context-aware AI agents. Input: text, image, sketch, or voice. AI agents generate complete multi-screen user journeys. Exports to Figma with layers and components intact. DESIGN.md format documents design decisions. 350 standard generations/month free.

name: v0 by Vercel
cap: Generates functional React UI components and full page layouts from text prompts. Output is production-quality code using Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui. Bridges design and dev handoff — UX designers can generate working prototypes without engineering support.

name: Dovetail
cap: AI-powered qualitative research repository. Auto-transcribes interviews and sessions, AI identifies themes, sentiment, and key quotes across the full dataset. Magic Tags auto-code transcripts. Reduces manual analysis time by 20-30%. Standard for UX and HFE research teams.

name: Maze
cap: Unmoderated usability testing connecting directly to Figma prototypes. Measures task success rate, time-on-task, misclick rate. AI thematic clustering analyzes open-ended responses at scale. Automated research reports with statistical significance indicators.

name: UserTesting
cap: Enterprise user research platform. AI sentiment analysis and theme highlighting cuts video review time ~60%. Large screened panel with 50+ demographic filters. Session recording, click tracking, heatmaps. Typically $15K-$50K/yr for enterprise teams.

name: Vizcom
cap: Purpose-built AI sketch-to-render for industrial and product design. Converts hand sketches into photorealistic renders in real time. Region masking controls AI modification areas. USDZ export enables AR product review on iPhone/iPad. Strongest dedicated tool for industrial design concept visualization.

name: Fusion 360
cap: Cloud-native 3D CAD/CAM/CAE with generative design built in. Generative design takes user-defined constraints and generates multiple optimized geometry solutions — critical for additive manufacturing. AI AutoConstrain applies sketch constraints automatically. Integrated simulation and CNC toolpath generation.

name: Gravity Sketch
cap: VR/AR 3D design tool for physical form exploration. Sketch, sculpt, and surface directly in immersive 3D space. AI curve smoothing and surface continuity. Widely used in footwear (Nike, Adidas), automotive, and consumer product studios. Exports to Rhino, Fusion 360, and SolidWorks.

name: nTop
cap: Computational engineering for complex geometry traditional CAD cannot model. Implicit modeling creates lattices, heat exchangers, and topology-optimized parts for additive manufacturing. ML-assisted smoothing respects manufacturing constraints. Standard for performance footwear, aerospace brackets, and medical implants.

name: KeyShot
cap: Industry-standard photorealistic product rendering. GPU-accelerated real-time ray tracing with AI denoising. Deep physically accurate material library. Native plugins for Rhino, SolidWorks, Fusion 360, CATIA, and 15+ other CAD platforms. Standard for product launch imagery, patents, and marketing photography.

name: Prome AI
cap: AI rendering from sketches and 3D model screenshots. Material swapping, scene control, lighting variation. Strong complement to Vizcom for product design; also used alongside Veras and D5 Render in architecture. Batch rendering for multiple variants.

name: CLO 3D
cap: Industry-standard 3D garment simulation. Physics-based engine accurately renders drape for silk, denim, knitwear, and performance fabrics. AI curve tools and FitModel customization enable made-to-measure. CLO-SET CONNECT cloud asset management. CLO-Vise PLM plugin for enterprise data exchange. Relevant to HDL anthropometry research for body scan integration.

name: Marvelous Designer
cap: 3D garment creation by CLO Virtual Fashion, focused on game and VFX character clothing. 2026.0 adds 3D Pencil (draw patterns directly onto 3D avatar), Lacing Tool, and EveryWear Rig Templates for game-ready clothing. Exports Alembic, FBX, USD, OBJ. Used by entertainment studios alongside CLO 3D for fashion brands.

name: Optitex
cap: Technical pattern making and grading with AI fit prediction. Stronger on production-grade pattern work than CLO 3D. AI grading scales patterns across size runs while maintaining fit intent. Integrates with Gerber AccuMark and Lectra PLM systems.

name: Browzwear
cap: 3D digital product creation focused on supply chain integration. Batch digital product image generation reduces photography costs. Virtual sampling pipeline integrates with PLM and Joor digital wholesale. Digital twin tracks garment through development and production. Strong for high-SKU brands.

name: Style3D
cap: Fastest-growing 3D fashion platform in 2026. AI-native from ground up: sketch-to-3D pipeline, AI template library, cloud rendering for marketing imagery. Strongest automation depth among 3D fashion tools. Growing Western market presence in 2025-26.

name: Heuritech
cap: AI trend forecasting using computer vision + social media signal extraction. Scans millions of images daily to detect early adoption of colors, prints, silhouettes 12-18 months ahead. Used by Coach, Adidas, and major European luxury houses for collection planning.

name: WGSN
cap: Industry-standard trend forecasting and consumer intelligence. AI deepened significantly 2024-25: AI-enhanced trend signal detection, Mindset consumer segmentation, seasonal color and material direction. WGSN Barometer tracks trend lifecycle from emergence to mass market.

name: WGSN Insight
cap: WGSN's retail-specific consumer intelligence product. AI demand forecasting signals from social, search, and sales data inform assortment planning and buying decisions. Used by buying teams at department stores and specialty retailers.

name: Joor AI
cap: AI tools added to Joor's digital wholesale platform. AI-driven inventory optimization, reorder suggestions, and demand signal analysis from digital buying session data. Processes $1.5B+ in GMV annually. AI buying recommendations reduce overstock and understock decisions.

name: Perch Interactive
cap: AI-triggered physical retail display system. Pressure sensors detect product pickup and immediately trigger relevant content on nearby screens — product story, ingredients, comparisons, how-to videos. Used in beauty, grocery, and electronics retail. Emerging experiential design tool for retail merchandising students.

name: CATIA Ergonomics
cap: Digital human modeling suite integrated with CATIA and SolidWorks. AI-assisted posture prediction evaluates reach zones, visibility cones, and joint loads. Industry standard for automotive cabin design, aerospace cockpits, and medical device HFE. Relevant for CDes HFE students applying ergonomic methods to product and workplace design.

name: AI Posture Analysis Tools
cap: Computer vision tools scoring REBA and RULA ergonomic risk from standard video footage. Replaces manual observation and angle measurement. ErgoPlus AI, KINEBOT, and OpenPose-based tools output automated MSD risk classifications. Reduces assessment time from hours to minutes.
